title: raphionacme angolensis
intro: Raphionacme angolensis is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Angolan snake flower or snake flower vine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Raphionacme angolensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used to make a topical paste for wound treatment.
